title: Revision of Grade Pay (GP) of Assistant (Judicial ) working in the National Green Tribunal(NGT) from the GP of Rs. 4200/- to GP of Rs 4600/-
description: Revision of Grade Pay (GP) of Assistant (Judicial ) working in the National Green Tribunal(NGT) from the GP of Rs. 4200/- to GP of Rs 4600/-
text: (3) Registrar, National Green Tribunal, Faridkot Housec Copernicus Marg, New Delhi-110001 (4) Deputy Controller of Accounts, National Green Tribunal, Faridkot House, Copernicus Marg, New Delhi-110001 Copy for information to: (1) PPS to Secretary, EF&CC, IPB, Jor Bagh, New Delhi-3 (2) PPS to AS (AKM), IPB, Jor Bagh, New Delhi-3 (3) PPS to EA(YS), IPB, Jor Bagh, New Delhi-3 Under Secretary to the Govt. of India Tel: 011-24695404.) Min. of Emir a (1) Pay & Account Officer, MoEF&CC, IPB, Jor Bagh, NeviiThTlic r4tinder secretarY c*i (2) Under Secretary (IT), MoEF&CC, IPB, Jor Bagh, Now D t o: India No.17(76)/2016-PUNGT WO' tltmit / Government of India g 3> %AC/all taculet J-iviieled Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change Ala Lri Thii).31- 13INT/Policy and Law Division Level-III, Jal Wing, Indira Paryavaran Bhavan, Jor Bagh Road, Aliganj, New Delhi-03 Date: 11/4/2018 ORDER Sub: Revision of Grade Pay (GP) of Assistant (Judicial) working in the National Green Tribunal (NGT) from the GP of Rs. 4200/- to GP of Rs. 4600/- reg. The undersigned is directed to refer to the subject mentioned above and to convey that the matter has been examined in consultation with the Ministry of Finance, Department of Expenditure and it has been decided to revise Grade Pay of Assistant (Judicial) in the National Green Tribunal from Rs. 4200/- (level -6) to Rs. 4600/- (level-7). The said revision in the Grade Pay of Assistant (Judicial) shall be effective from 03)04.2018. 2. The revision in the Grade Pay of Assistant (Judicial) in the National Green Tribunal has been made with the approval of Hon'ble Finance Minister vide U. 0. No. 13(4)/E.III13/2017 dated 03.04.2018. (M. K. ai) -- 1 of 1 --
